UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUNG, WONHEUNG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1169 MARKET STREET, #623, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, **TO INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS.**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT JUNG, WONHEUNG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
